title: Door to door canvassing
description:
SimplerCloud Pte Ltd is hiring a Casual/Temporary Sales Canvassing role in Bukit Batok, Singapore. Apply now to be part of our team.

Requirements for this role:

  • Between Mon to Fri, office hours.

  • 1 year of relevant part-time or full-time work experience required for this role OR general inclination towards customer service/sales

  • Time range is: Mon to Friday, 9AM to 5PM

Expected salary: $16 - $18 per hour

Able to work for minimum of 8-20 weeks for min 4 hours per week

Summary

We are looking for people for flyer distribution and limited door-to-door canvassing in office buildings for a fixed-term project. Canvasing (door to door) is mandatory.

Other work includes:

Updating sales database (Excel/Sheets)

The job is on a per-hour basis with a minimum 4 hours per week. Promotion to full-time sales rep based on performance is a strong possibility. Although no prior experience is necessary, the work requires communicating with people and a generally communicative personality. An inclination towards sales or customer service will also be helpful.

Description

1. Door to door canvasing in commercial (office) buildings

2. Flyer distribution and mailbox flyer insertion

3. Sales administration and research work

Requirements

• Must respect the workplace and colleagues.

• Must have a sense of responsibility and self-accountability. This is a job.

• Must have a strong sense of detail and self-organization

• Must be able to adapt to instructions and circumstances.

• A positive and communicative personality would be helpful.

• Must be able to use basic communication software, smartphone and device.

• Must be able to use basic map/gps app such as Google maps

• Must be able to communicate and interact well

• Must be able to use basic office software and cloud software (Word, Excel, Drive, Sheets, and email)

• Must have a self-confident personality, canvasing is required and not optional

• Must be willing to learn, training will be provided

FAQ:

1. Yes, more hours can be added if requested, but subject to Monitor's schedule.

2. No, weekend hours for this position is not available

3. This is not a full-time work position

Suitable for

- qualified parties looking for part-time or add-on work

- students who qualify for the job requirements

Interested candidates please apply via the application button. Please include the following items in your resume:

• Relevant prior experience

• Availability to commence work

• Availability for phone interview

Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Thank you for your application.

Job Types: Full-time, Part-time, Contract, Temporary, Internship, Freelance

Benefits:

• Flexible schedule

• Professional development

• Promotion to permanent employee

Schedule:

• Monday to Friday, Office Hours

Work Location: In person

districts.location: D23 Hillview, Dairy Farm, Bukit Panjang, Choa Chu Kang
